title: Mild's Armored Elytra
description: A data pack that changes the overpowered concept to a vanilla friendly, balanced feature.
body:
![Main Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da14862ea7648b43fa5630917722bf9d6357dc2f.webp)

For Minecraft 1.21.4
Created by MildGlitch

Unlock the power of flight while staying protected with the Armored Elytra Datapack! This innovative datapack allows players to craft a special chestplate that combines the best of both worlds — Elytra and Armor. Enjoy the ability to fly like never before without sacrificing your defense, making you more mobile and battle-ready than ever.

With this datapack, you can craft a unique Elytra Chestplate that grants you the ability to soar through the skies and the protection of a full armor set. It’s perfect for exploration, adventure, or simply flying high above the Minecraft world with the added bonus of armor to keep you safe from harm.

Features:
- Elytra Upgraded Chestplates
- Elytra Upgrade Smithing Template (1/500 chance to drop from shulkers)



TO GET SMITHING TEMPLATE IT WILL DROP FROM SHULKERS AT A 0.2% CHANCE OF DROPPING


OR YOU CAN DO /function elytraupgrade:give_upgrade TO GET IT WITH CHEATS!
